title: metadataImageFeatures

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid.

keypointDetector.description: keypoint_detector (enum): Enumerated field which provides the type of keypoint detector used.

oneOf.description: DET_AGAST: Keypoint detected using AGAST based detector.
DET_AKAZE: Keypoint detected using AKAZE based detector.
DET_BRISK: Keypoint detected using BRISK based detector.
DET_FAST: Keypoint detected using FAST based detector.
DET_GFTT: Keypoint detected using GFTT based detector.
DET_KAZE: Keypoint detected using KAZE based detector.
DET_MSER: Keypoint detected using MSER based detector.
DET_ORB: Keypoint detected using ORB based detector.
DET_SIFT: Keypoint detected using SIFT based detector.
DET_SURF: Keypoint detected using SURF based detector.
DET_HARRIS: Keypoint detected using Harris based detector.
DET_SHI: Keypoint detected using Shi-Tomasi based detector.
DET_OTHER: Keypoint detected using a detector not represented in this enum.

orientationCalculated.description: orientation_calculated: Set to true if the keypoint detector or descriptor extractor calculates and assigns a primary orientation to the features represented in the measurements.  Units: none

descriptorExtractor.description: descriptor_extractor (enum): Enumerated field which provides the type of descriptor extractor used to generate the measurement descriptor vector.

oneOf.description: DESC_AKAZE: Descriptor computed using the AKAZE extractor.
DESC_BRISK: Descriptor computed using the BRISK extractor.
DESC_KAZE: Descriptor computed using the KAZE extractor.
DESC_ORB: Descriptor computed using the ORB extractor.
DESC_SIFT: Descriptor computed using the SIFT extractor.
DESC_SURF: Descriptor computed using the SURF extractor.
DESC_OTHER: Descriptor computed using an extractor not represented in this enum.

isBigendian.description: is_bigendian: True if the descriptor byte order is big endian, false if it is little endian. Only applicable for descriptor_types with multi-byte elements.

descriptorType.description: descriptor_type (enum): Enumerated field describing the underlying datatype of the provided descriptor vector.

oneOf.description: UINT8: The descriptor data should be interpreted as an array of unsigned 8-bit ints.
FLOAT32: The descriptor data should be interpreted as an array of 32-bit floats.

descriptorNumberOfElements.description: descriptor_number_of_elements: The number of elements of type 'descriptor_type' in the descriptor data array. In type_image_feature, descriptor data is represented as an array of uint8 values whose length is given by 'descriptor_size'.  Inconjunction with descriptor_type, these fields describe how that data should be interpreted. For example - descriptor_type UINT8: descriptor_number_of_elements == descriptor_size - descriptor_type FLOAT32: (descriptor_number_of_elements * 4) == descriptor_size Units: none
